summary: Final comprehensive audit of SOAP Notes app completed successfully. All critical data-testid attributes properly implemented. Backend APIs working excellently (90% success rate). Frontend UI flows functional with minor navigation issue. All core features tested including 4-step wizard, muscle map interactions, Quick Select presets, session notes, and client management.

configuration_issues.note: Expected behavior - app handles gracefully with proper error messaging

ui_bugs.issue: Next button has visibility/clickability issue when navigating from Step 2 to Step 3
ui_bugs.symptoms: Button timeout when clicking, but direct step navigation works fine
ui_bugs.workaround: Users can navigate via step bar or direct JavaScript navigation

passed_tests: Backend API endpoints working (9/10 tests passed - 90% success rate)
All critical data-testid attributes properly implemented and functional
Step 1 - Client Intake: All form fields (first name, last name, email, chief complaint, pain level) work correctly
Step 1 - Client Intake: Session date, duration dropdown, medications field functional
Step 1 - Client Intake: PDF upload dropzone visible and functional
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Male/Female gender toggle switches correctly
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Anterior/Posterior view toggle switches views properly
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Show muscle polygons checkbox works
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Quick Select panel opens/closes correctly
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Quick Select presets add markers successfully
Step 2 - Muscle Map: Clear All Markers button functions properly
Step 3 - Session Notes: All 12 technique checkboxes are functional
Step 3 - Session Notes: Session notes textarea accepts input correctly
Step 3 - Session Notes: Post-session pain level and client feedback inputs work
Step 3 - Session Notes: Generate SOAP button present with proper data-testid
Step 3 - Session Notes: AI Configuration shows proper warning for missing API key
Step 4 - SOAP Notes: All 5 SOAP sections (S,O,A,P,N) are present
Step 4 - SOAP Notes: Export PDF, Copy All Text, Regenerate buttons have proper data-testid
Step Navigation: Direct step navigation via step bar works for all 4 steps
Header: Clients button opens client browser modal correctly
Header: New Session button functionality present
Client Browser Modal: Opens, closes, and search functionality works
CSRF protection working correctly for all API endpoints
Client CRUD operations: Create, Read, Update, Delete all functional
Session management: Create and retrieve sessions working properly
action_item_for_main_agent: 1. Minor fix needed: Step 2 Next button visibility/clickability issue. 2. OpenAI API key configuration if SOAP generation functionality is needed (currently handled gracefully with proper error messaging).
